description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a minimalist design, upholstered in a light beige fabric. The sofa features three large, rectangular back cushions and a chaise lounge extension on the right side, providing ample seating and lounging space. The armrests are straight, slim, and of equal height to the backrest, contributing to a clean, boxy silhouette. The sofa sits on slender, metallic legs that are slightly angled, giving it a light and airy appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or tufting, emphasizing a contemporary aesthetic. This piece would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or communal lounge areas.
description: A modern L-shaped beige sectional sofa with slim metallic legs, straight armrests, and smooth upholstery. Features a chaise lounge extension and three large back cushions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three back cushions, chaise lounge on the right, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat, the straight armrest, and the profile of the back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform height and alignment of the backrest and cushions, as well as the sofa's clean lines.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the chaise lounge extension and the straight armrest on the left.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large, uniform, rectangular back cushions and a single continuous seat cushion with a chaise extension; all cushions appear attached and evenly spaced.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, slim armrests of equal height to the backrest, with a boxy profile and no visible decorative elements or padding contrast.
attribute_leg_design: Six slender, metallic legs positioned at the corners and under the chaise for support; legs are straight, slightly angled, and have a polished silver finish.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and continuous backrest with three attached rectangular cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
